customer_anxiety_profile: Low defensiveness, process-conscious. Kelly checks commitment level three times across the call but accepts each reassurance without pushback. Her anxiety is procedural ('am I signing up for something?'), not adversarial. She engages warmly once reassured.
unresolved_concerns: Whether solar is viable on the house roof given shade from the front-yard tree — the garage roof is the proposed alternative, but this depends on the reroof conversation
The 20-year garage roof needing replacement before solar can be installed — Meg named the roofing program but did not route it; the closer needs to address roofing as a prerequisite or parallel track
Monthly payment expectation — Kelly said she wants to know what she'll pay monthly; the closer should open with this number early in the presentation

Phone connectivity issue — Kelly warned that her home is a dead zone and asked for a text before the call so she can call back; this is a logistics promise, not a concern to be resolved, but the closer must honor it
sensitive_topics_raised: Kelly's employer is shut down for at least the next week — she is either laid off temporarily or on a work stoppage; the closer should not assume stable employment income without checking

Budget billing enrollment — Kelly is on Ameren's budget program, meaning her stated $221/month is an averaged payment, not her actual consumption cost; the $500 summer figure is the real baseline the system needs to offset
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment is scheduled for tomorrow at 11AM as a phone call
Meg will text the closer's contact information to Kelly before the call so Kelly can call back if it goes to voicemail
Closer will also email appointment details to Kelly
The appointment is phone-only initially; if Kelly likes the design, a site survey will follow where someone comes out to measure the roof
closer_should_know: Kelly's connectivity warning is the logistical priority — text her before calling, because her home drops calls, and she will not answer an unknown number going straight to voicemail. Lead with the monthly payment number early since that is the specific question Kelly named. The garage roof needing replacement before solar is the central technical issue; treat it as a parallel conversation, not a disqualifier, and reference the roofing program Meg mentioned.
